notes: Developer backend System Announcements now have real Chrome lifecycle coverage: create publishes immediately, edit persists title/content/type, unpublish clears publishedAt, republish refreshes publishedAt, delete removes the record, and enterprise users receive 403 for read/write developer announcement APIs. Full Chrome smoke is now 16/16. Product Green remains Yellow for production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download beyond current slices.
